    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    void
    ImportFilterManager.fillAndWriteMappingTables(EntityGraph entityGraph, JobManager jobManager, OutputStreamWriter dmlResultWriter, int numberOfEntities, Session targetSession, DBMS targetDBMSConfiguration)
    Inserts the values of columns with non-derived import-filters into the local database and writes the mapping table DML to the given writer.
